850:         chart_top = row_top + row_h + 20
851:         chart_h = 190
852:         self.draw_curves(painter, QtCore.QRectF(margin, chart_top, rect.width() - 2 * margin, chart_h))
853: 
854:         y_panel_h = 96
855:         controls_h = 78
856:         lower_top = chart_top + chart_h + 20
857:         lower_h = max(64, rect.height() - lower_top - y_panel_h - controls_h - 18)
858:         left_w = int((rect.width() - 2 * margin) * 0.68)
859:         self.draw_waterfall(painter, QtCore.QRectF(margin, lower_top, left_w, lower_h))
860:         self.draw_feature_table(
861:             painter,
862:             QtCore.QRectF(margin + left_w + 24, lower_top, rect.width() - 2 * margin - left_w - 24, lower_h),
863:         )
864: 
865:         y_panel_top = lower_top + lower_h + 18
866:         self.draw_y_position_panel(
867:             painter,
868:             QtCore.QRectF(margin, y_panel_top, rect.width() - 2 * margin, y_panel_h),
869:         )
870: 
871:         self.draw_controls_labels(painter)
872:         if not self.payload.get("ready"):
873:             self.draw_calibration(painter, rect)
874: 
875:     def draw_header(self, painter, rect):
876:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20))
877:         title = QtGui.QFont("Helvetica Neue", 24)
878:         title.setWeight(QtGui.QFont.Medium)
879:         painter.setFont(title)
880:         painter.drawText(rect, QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop, "CSI Feature Viewer")
881: 
882:         small = QtGui.QFont("Menlo", 11)
883:         painter.setFont(small)
884:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(70, 70, 70))
885:         if self.payload.get("ready"):
886:             mask = self.payload.get("subcarrier_mask")
887:             mask_text = (
888:                 f"   usable subcarriers {mask['usable_count']}/{mask['subcarriers']}"
889:                 if mask
890:                 else ""
891:             )
892:             filters = self.payload.get("filters", {})
893:             filter_text = (
894:                 f"   median {filters['median_window']}   y avg {filters['position_average_window']}"
895:                 if filters
896:                 else ""
897:             )
898:             baseline_text = ""
899:             if filters and filters.get("baseline_alpha", 0.0) > 0:
900:                 drift = self.payload.get("features", {}).get(self.selected_receiver, {}).get("baseline_drift", 0.0)
901:                 baseline_text = f"   adaptive baseline drift {drift:.2f}"
902:             thresholds = filters.get("thresholds", {})
903:             threshold_text = ""
904:             if thresholds:
905:                 threshold_text = (
906:                     f"   top_div={thresholds.get('top_pct_norm_divisor', 0):.0f} "
907:                     f"motion_div={thresholds.get('motion_norm_divisor', 0):.0f}"
908:                 )
909:             text = (
910:                 f"winner {self.payload.get('winner')}   "
911:                 f"position {self.payload.get('position', 0.0):+.2f}   "
912:                 f"activity {self.payload.get('activity', 0.0):.2f}"
913:                 f"{mask_text}"
914:                 f"{filter_text}"
915:                 f"{baseline_text}"
916:                 f"{threshold_text}"
917:             )
918:         else:
919:             text = self.status
920:         painter.drawText(rect.adjusted(0, 38, 0, 0), QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop, text)
921: 
922:     def draw_zone_panel(self, painter, rect):
923:         self.draw_panel_outline(painter, rect)
924:         confidence = self.payload.get("confidence", {})
925:         zone_centers = {
926:             "left": rect.left() + rect.width() * 0.18,
927:             "center": rect.left() + rect.width() * 0.5,
928:             "right": rect.left() + rect.width() * 0.82,
929:         }
930:         baseline_y = rect.bottom() - 42
931:         max_bar_h = rect.height() - 68
932: 
933:         for label in ZONE_ORDER:
934:             value = confidence.get(label, 0.0)
935:             x = zone_centers[label]
936:             color = ZONE_COLORS[label]
937:             painter.setPen(QtCore.Qt.NoPen)
938:             painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(color.red(), color.green(), color.blue(), 46))
939:             painter.drawRoundedRect(QtCore.QRectF(x - 34, baseline_y - max_bar_h, 68, max_bar_h), 3, 3)
940:             painter.setBrush(color)
941:             painter.drawRoundedRect(QtCore.QRectF(x - 34, baseline_y - max_bar_h * value, 68, max_bar_h * value), 3, 3)
942:             painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20))
943:             painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Menlo", 10))
944:             painter.drawText(QtCore.QRectF(x - 58, baseline_y + 12, 116, 18), QtCore.Qt.AlignCenter, f"{label} {value:.2f}")
945: 
946:         line_y = rect.top() + 32
947:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20, 70), 1))
948:         painter.drawLine(QtCore.QPointF(rect.left() + 60, line_y), QtCore.QPointF(rect.right() - 60, line_y))
949:         pos = clamp((self.payload.get("position", 0.0) + 1.0) / 2.0)
950:         marker_x = rect.left() + 60 + (rect.width() - 120) * pos
951:         painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0))
952:         painter.setPen(QtCore.Qt.NoPen)
953:         painter.drawEllipse(QtCore.QPointF(marker_x, line_y), 7, 7)
954: 
955:     def draw_curves(self, painter, rect):
956:         self.draw_panel_outline(painter, rect)
957:         painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Helvetica Neue", 12))
958:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20))
959:         painter.drawText(rect.adjusted(14, 10, -14, 0), QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop, "motion and presence over time")
960: 
961:         plot = rect.adjusted(18, 42, -18, -20)
962:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QPen(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 35), 1))
963:         for index in range(4):
964:             y = plot.top() + plot.height() * index / 3
965:             painter.drawLine(QtCore.QPointF(plot.left(), y), QtCore.QPointF(plot.right(), y))
966: 
967:         max_value = max(
968:             [0.4]
969:             + [value for label in ZONE_ORDER for value in self.motion_history[label]]
970:             + [value for label in ZONE_ORDER for value in self.presence_history[label]]
971:         )
972:         for label in ZONE_ORDER:
973:             self.draw_history_line(painter, plot, self.presence_history[label], max_value, ZONE_COLORS[label], 2.4)
974:             pale = QtGui.QColor(ZONE_COLORS[label])
975:             pale.setAlpha(95)
976:             self.draw_history_line(painter, plot, self.motion_history[label], max_value, pale, 1.3)
977: 
978:     def draw_history_line(self, painter, rect, values, max_value, color, width):
979:         if len(values) < 2:
980:             return
981:         points = []
982:         for index, value in enumerate(values):
983:             x = rect.left() + rect.width() * index / (values.maxlen - 1)
984:             y = rect.bottom() - rect.height() * clamp(value / max_value)
985:             points.append(QtCore.QPointF(x, y))
986:         path = QtGui.QPainterPath(points[0])
987:         for point in points[1:]:
988:             path.lineTo(point)
989:         pen = QtGui.QPen(color, width)
990:         pen.setCapStyle(QtCore.Qt.RoundCap)
991:         painter.setPen(pen)
992:         painter.drawPath(path)
993: 
994:     def draw_waterfall(self, painter, rect):
995:         self.draw_panel_outline(painter, rect)
996:         painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Helvetica Neue", 12))
997:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20))
998:         painter.drawText(
999:             rect.adjusted(14, 10, -14, 0),
1000:             QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop,
1001:             f"{self.selected_receiver} usable subcarrier amplitude delta waterfall",
1002:         )
1003:         image_rect = rect.adjusted(16, 42, -16, -18)
1004:         rows = list(self.waterfall)
1005:         if not rows:
1006:             painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(95, 95, 95))
1007:             painter.drawText(image_rect, QtCore.Qt.AlignCenter, "waiting for calibrated CSI frames")
1008:             return
1009:         width = min(len(row) for row in rows)
1010:         image = QtGui.QImage(width, self.waterfall_rows, QtGui.QImage.Format_RGB32)
1011:         image.fill(QtGui.QColor(245, 245, 243))
1012:         start_y = self.waterfall_rows - len(rows)
1013:         for row_index, row in enumerate(rows):
1014:             y = start_y + row_index
1015:             for x in range(width):
1016:                 level = clamp(row[x] / self.waterfall_scale)
1017:                 shade = int(250 - 230 * level)
1018:                 image.setPixelColor(x, y, QtGui.QColor(shade, shade, shade))
1019:         painter.drawImage(image_rect, image)
1020: 
1021:     def draw_feature_table(self, painter, rect):
1022:         self.draw_panel_outline(painter, rect)
1023:         painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Helvetica Neue", 12))
1024:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20))
1025:         painter.drawText(rect.adjusted(14, 10, -14, 0), QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop, "current receiver features")
1026: 
1027:         mono = QtGui.QFont("Menlo", 10)
1028:         painter.setFont(mono)
1029:         y = rect.top() + 48
1030:         features = self.payload.get("features", {})
1031:         for label in ZONE_ORDER:
1032:             item = features.get(label, {})
1033:             color = ZONE_COLORS[label]
1034:             painter.setPen(color)
1035:             painter.drawText(QtCore.QPointF(rect.left() + 14, y), label)
1036:             painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(35, 35, 35))
1037:             values = (
1038:                 f"presence {item.get('presence_score', 0.0):6.2f}   "
1039:                 f"motion {item.get('motion_score', 0.0):6.2f}\n"
1040:                 f"phase    {item.get('phase_motion_score', 0.0):6.2f}   "
1041:                 f"p95 {item.get('delta_p95', 0.0):6.2f}\n"
1042:                 f"rssi {item.get('rssi', 0):4}   "
1043:                 f"mean amp {item.get('mean_amp', 0.0):6.2f}   "
1044:                 f"drift {item.get('baseline_drift', 0.0):5.2f}   "
1045:                 f"rows {item.get('rows', 0)}"
1046:             )
1047:             painter.drawText(QtCore.QRectF(rect.left() + 92, y - 12, rect.width() - 106, 58), QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft, values)
1048:             y += 82
1049: 
1050:     def draw_y_position_panel(self, painter, rect):
1051:         self.draw_panel_outline(painter, rect)
1052:         painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Helvetica Neue", 12))
1053:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20))
1054:         painter.drawText(rect.adjusted(14, 10, -14, 0), QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop, "estimated y position")
1055: 
1056:         confidence = self.payload.get("confidence", {})
1057:         max_confidence = self.payload.get(
1058:             "target_confidence",
1059:             max(confidence.values(), default=0.0),
1060:         )
1061:         max_confidence_raw = self.payload.get("target_confidence_raw", max_confidence)
1062:         position = clamp((self.payload.get("position", 0.0) + 1.0) / 2.0)
1063:         active = self.payload.get("ready") and max_confidence >= self.y_confidence_threshold
1064: 
1065:         track = QtCore.QRectF(rect.left() + 18, rect.top() + 52, rect.width() - 36, 18)
1066:         painter.setPen(QtCore.Qt.NoPen)
1067:         painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 18))
1068:         painter.drawRoundedRect(track, 9, 9)
1069: 
1070:         zone_font = QtGui.QFont("Menlo", 9)
1071:         painter.setFont(zone_font)
1072:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(80, 80, 80))
1073:         painter.drawText(QtCore.QRectF(track.left(), track.bottom() + 6, 100, 14), QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft, "left")
1074:         painter.drawText(QtCore.QRectF(track.center().x() - 50, track.bottom() + 6, 100, 14), QtCore.Qt.AlignCenter, "center")
1075:         painter.drawText(QtCore.QRectF(track.right() - 100, track.bottom() + 6, 100, 14), QtCore.Qt.AlignRight, "right")
1076: 
1077:         if not active:
1078:             painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Menlo", 10))
1079:             painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(85, 85, 85))
1080:             status = (
1081:                 f"hidden below threshold {self.y_confidence_threshold:.2f}"
1082:                 if self.payload.get("ready")
1083:                 else "waiting for calibrated CSI frames"
1084:             )
1085:             painter.drawText(rect.adjusted(14, 30, -14, 0), QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop, status)
1086:             return
1087: 
1088:         weighted_variance = sum(
1089:             confidence.get(label, 0.0)
1090:             * (ZONE_X[label] - self.payload.get("position", 0.0)) ** 2
1091:             for label in ZONE_ORDER
1092:         )
1093:         uncertainty = clamp(math.sqrt(max(0.0, weighted_variance)))
1094:         half_width = track.width() * clamp(0.07 + 0.26 * uncertainty + 0.14 * (1.0 - max_confidence), 0.06, 0.42)
1095:         center_x = track.left() + track.width() * position
1096:         left = max(track.left(), center_x - half_width)
1097:         right = min(track.right(), center_x + half_width)
1098: 
1099:         gradient = QtGui.QLinearGradient(left, 0, right, 0)
1100:         peak_alpha = int(92 + 125 * max_confidence)
1101:         gradient.setColorAt(0.0, QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 0))
1102:         gradient.setColorAt(0.22, QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, int(peak_alpha * 0.55)))
1103:         gradient.setColorAt(0.5, QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, peak_alpha))
1104:         gradient.setColorAt(0.78, QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, int(peak_alpha * 0.55)))
1105:         gradient.setColorAt(1.0, QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 0))
1106:         painter.setPen(QtCore.Qt.NoPen)
1107:         painter.setBrush(gradient)
1108:         painter.drawRoundedRect(QtCore.QRectF(left, track.top(), right - left, track.height()), 9, 9)
1109: 
1110:         painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0))
1111:         painter.drawRoundedRect(QtCore.QRectF(center_x - 1.5, track.top() - 5, 3, track.height() + 10), 1.5, 1.5)
1112:         painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Menlo", 10))
1113:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(35, 35, 35))
1114:         painter.drawText(
1115:             rect.adjusted(14, 30, -14, 0),
1116:             QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop,
1117:             f"y {self.payload.get('position', 0.0):+.2f}   confidence {max_confidence:.2f}   raw {max_confidence_raw:.2f}   uncertainty {uncertainty:.2f}",
1118:         )
1119: 
1120:     def draw_controls_labels(self, painter):
1121:         painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Helvetica Neue", 10))
1122:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(80, 80, 80))
1123:         painter.drawText(
1124:             QtCore.QPointF(self.receiver_select.x(), self.receiver_select.y() - 8),
1125:             "waterfall receiver",
1126:         )
1127:         painter.drawText(
1128:             QtCore.QPointF(self.calibration_slider.x(), self.calibration_slider.y() - 8),
1129:             f"baseline frames {self.calibration_frames}",
1130:         )
1131:         painter.drawText(
1132:             QtCore.QPointF(self.baseline_alpha_slider.x(), self.baseline_alpha_slider.y() - 8),
1133:             f"adaptive baseline {self.baseline_alpha:.3f}",
1134:         )
1135:         painter.drawText(
1136:             QtCore.QPointF(self.scale_slider.x(), self.scale_slider.y() - 8),
1137:             f"waterfall contrast {self.waterfall_scale:.1f}",
1138:         )
1139:         painter.drawText(
1140:             QtCore.QPointF(self.y_threshold_slider.x(), self.y_threshold_slider.y() - 8),
1141:             f"confidence threshold {self.y_confidence_threshold:.2f}",
1142:         )
1143: 
1144:     def draw_calibration(self, painter, rect):
1145:         progress = self.payload.get("progress", {})
1146:         value = sum(progress.get(label, 0.0) for label in ZONE_ORDER) / len(ZONE_ORDER)
1147:         bar = QtCore.QRectF(rect.width() * 0.24, rect.height() * 0.93, rect.width() * 0.52, 3)
1148:         painter.setPen(QtCore.Qt.NoPen)
1149:         painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 26))
1150:         painter.drawRect(bar)
1151:         painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 150))
1152:         painter.drawRect(QtCore.QRectF(bar.left(), bar.top(), bar.width() * value, bar.height()))
1153: 
1154:     def draw_panel_outline(self, painter, rect):
1155:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QPen(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 36), 1))
1156:         painter.setBrush(QtCore.Qt.NoBrush)
1157:         painter.drawRoundedRect(rect, 4, 4)
1158: 
1159: 
1160: def parse_receivers(args):
1161:     receivers = dict(DEFAULT_RECEIVERS)
1162:     for item in args.receiver or []:
1163:         label, port = item.split("=", 1)
1164:         if label not in ZONE_ORDER:
1165:             raise ValueError(f"Unknown receiver label: {label}")
1166:         receivers[label] = port
1167:     return receivers
1168: 
1169: 
1170: def main():
1171:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Live CSI feature viewer and optional feature CSV logger.")
1172:     parser.add_argument("--baud", type=int, default=921600)
1173:     parser.add_argument("--calibration-frames", type=int, default=300)
1174:     parser.add_argument("--emit-interval", type=float, default=0.08)
1175:     parser.add_argument("--score-alpha", type=float, default=0.28)
1176:     parser.add_argument(
1177:         "--median-window",
1178:         type=int,
1179:         default=3,
1180:         help="Rolling median window for raw per-receiver CSI features. Use 1 to disable.",
1181:     )
1182:     parser.add_argument(
1183:         "--position-average-window",
1184:         type=int,
1185:         default=5,
1186:         help="Moving average window for final y position and target confidence. Use 1 to disable.",
1187:     )
1188:     parser.add_argument("--waterfall-rows", type=int, default=150)
1189:     parser.add_argument("--waterfall-scale", type=float, default=8.0)
1190:     parser.add_argument("--log-csv", help="Optional path for feature CSV output.")
1191:     parser.add_argument(
1192:         "--subcarrier-mask",
1193:         default="captures/subcarrier_quality_20260506.json",
1194:         help="Optional JSON mask from csi_subcarrier_quality.py. Defaults to today's generated mask if present.",
1195:     )
1196:     parser.add_argument(
1197:         "--receiver",
1198:         action="append",
1199:         help="Override a receiver port, for example: left=/dev/cu.usbmodem1101",
1200:     )
1201:     parser.add_argument(
1202:         "--baseline-alpha",
1203:         type=float,
1204:         default=0.0,
1205:         help="Adaptive baseline EMA rate (0.0=off, 0.001-0.05 recommended).",
1206:     )
1207:     parser.add_argument(
1208:         "--top-pct-norm-divisor",
1209:         type=float,
1210:         default=TOP_PCT_NORM_DIVISOR,
1211:         help="Divisor for top-percentile amplitude normalization (1m default: 120.0, 6m default: 30.0).",
1212:     )
1213:     parser.add_argument(
1214:         "--motion-norm-divisor",
1215:         type=float,
1216:         default=MOTION_NORM_DIVISOR,
1217:         help="Divisor for motion normalization (1m default: 40.0, 6m default: 15.0).",
1218:     )
1219:     parser.add_argument(
1220:         "--top-pct-ema-alpha",
1221:         type=float,
1222:         default=TOP_PCT_EMA_ALPHA,
1223:         help="EMA smoothing for top-percentile presence (0.1=heavy smooth, 0.5=fast).",
1224:     )
1225:     parser.add_argument(
1226:         "--motion-ema-alpha",
1227:         type=float,
1228:         default=MOTION_EMA_ALPHA,
1229:         help="EMA smoothing for motion presence (0.1=heavy smooth, 0.5=fast).",
1230:     )
1231:     parser.add_argument(
1232:         "--combined-top-pct-weight",
1233:         type=float,
1234:         default=COMBINED_TOP_PCT_WEIGHT,
1235:         help="Weight for top-pct in combined score (0.6 = 60% top-pct, 40% motion).",
1236:     )
1237:     args = parser.parse_args()
1238:     subcarrier_mask = None
1239:     if args.subcarrier_mask:
1240:         mask_path = Path(args.subcarrier_mask)
1241:         if mask_path.exists():
1242:             subcarrier_mask = load_subcarrier_mask(mask_path)
1243:             if subcarrier_mask:
1244:                 print(
1245:                     "subcarrier mask active: "
1246:                     f"{subcarrier_mask['usable_count']}/{subcarrier_mask['subcarriers']} usable "
1247:                     f"({subcarrier_mask['rejected_count']} ignored)",
1248:                     flush=True,
1249:                 )
1250:         else:
1251:             print(f"subcarrier mask not found, using all subcarriers: {mask_path}", flush=True)
1252: 
1253:     app = QtWidgets.QApplication(sys.argv)
1254:     view = FeatureView(args.waterfall_rows, args.waterfall_scale, args.calibration_frames)
1255:     view.baseline_alpha = clamp(args.baseline_alpha, 0.0, 0.05)
1256:     view.baseline_alpha_slider.setValue(int(view.baseline_alpha * 1000))
1257:     worker = FeatureWorker(
1258:         receivers=parse_receivers(args),
1259:         baud=args.baud,
1260:         calibration_frames=args.calibration_frames,
1261:         emit_interval=args.emit_interval,
1262:         score_alpha=clamp(args.score_alpha, 0.02, 1.0),
1263:         log_csv=args.log_csv,
1264:         subcarrier_mask=subcarrier_mask,
1265:         median_window=args.median_window,
1266:         position_average_window=args.position_average_window,
1267:         baseline_alpha=view.baseline_alpha,
1268:         baseline_motion_gate=0.6,
1269:         top_pct_norm_divisor=args.top_pct_norm_divisor,
1270:         motion_norm_divisor=args.motion_norm_divisor,
1271:         top_pct_ema_alpha=args.top_pct_ema_alpha,
1272:         motion_ema_alpha=args.motion_ema_alpha,
1273:         combined_top_pct_weight=args.combined_top_pct_weight,
1274:     )
1275:     worker.values.connect(view.set_values)
1276:     worker.status.connect(view.set_status)
1277:     worker.status.connect(lambda message: print(message, flush=True))
1278:     view.recalibrate_requested.connect(worker.request_recalibration)
1279:     view.baseline_alpha_changed.connect(worker.set_baseline_alpha)
1280:     app.aboutToQuit.connect(worker.stop)
1281: 
1282:     view.show()
1283:     worker.start()
1284:     result = app.exec_()
1285:     worker.stop()
1286:     worker.wait(1500)
1287:     return result
1288: 
1289: 
1290: if __name__ == "__main__":
1291:     try:
1292:         sys.exit(main())
1293:     except KeyboardInterrupt:
1294:         sys.exit(0)

(End of file - total 1294 lines)

Let's draft the updated summary.

Structure:
## Goal
- Validate and tune amplitude-based presence detection at ~1m, integrate subcarrier-weighted detection for robustness, and design p5.js JSON stream for wall projection.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Hardware: 1x Heltec sender (`/dev/cu.usbserial-0001`), 3x Arduino Nano receivers (`/dev/cu.usbmodem1101`, `101`, `2101`)
- Layout: Sender ~1m behind wall; receivers ~1.3m apart
- Visualization: PyQt5 desktop UI + p5.js wall projection
- ESP-IDF v5.5.4, baud 921600, 166/192 subcarriers usable

## Progress
### Done
- Added CLI args (`--top-pct-norm-divisor`, `--motion-norm-divisor`, EMA alphas) to `csi_feature_viewer.py`, `csi_zone_visualizer.py`, `csi_advanced_baseline_test.py` (1m defaults: 120.0 / 40.0)
- Updated `prototype-commands.md` with 1m layout, threshold tuning guide, and new CLI flags
- Phase Y-tracking (`csi_phase_position_test.py`) and CIR tracking (`csi_cir_test.py`) proven infeasible: phase σ=1.25-2.12 rad, CIR energy ratio 0.02-0.15, tap positions unstable
- Created `csi_enhanced_spatial_test.py` with CoV-based subcarrier weighting + cross-receiver amplitude correlation
- Fixed motion normalization bug in enhanced test (was accumulating sum instead of computing mean)
- Enhanced test confirmed subcarrier weighting improves per-receiver detection sensitivity but does not unlock finer spatial resolution than 3-zone amplitude
### In Progress
- Integrating subcarrier-weighted detection pipeline into `csi_feature_viewer.py` and `csi_zone_visualizer.py`
- Designing lightweight JSON stream output format for p5.js wall projection
### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Abandoned phase cross-correlation and CIR-based Y-tracking (clock drift/multipath dominate at 1m through wall)
- Accept 3-zone spatial resolution; use 192-dim CSI for weighted detection robustness instead of finer positioning
- CLI-based threshold tuning adopted over hardcoded divisors to support 1m vs 6m setups

## Next Steps
- Complete weighted detection integration in PyQt5 UI tools
- Define and implement p5.js JSON stream schema and emitter
- Update `prototype-commands.md` with enhanced spatial detection docs and p5.js integration commands

## Critical Context
- Phase/CIR failures: phase σ remains high (1.2-2.1 rad) even at 1m; CIR taps jump unpredictably due to wall reflections dominating multipath
- Subcarrier CoV weights are nearly uniform after masking → all subcarriers respond similarly to movement
- Motion raw values ~1-140; calibration motion mean ~9.2, std ~10.5 (post-bugfix)
- Normalization divisors for 1m: top_pct=120.0, motion=40.0 (vs legacy 6m: 30.0/15.0)
- Combined presence: `0.6 * top_pct + 0.4 * motion` with EMA smoothing (alpha 0.25/0.30)

## Relevant Files
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_enhanced_spatial_test.py`: CoV-weighted amplitude + cross-receiver correlation test
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_cir_test.py`: CIR diagnostic (abandoned for positioning)
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_phase_position_test.py`: Phase Y-tracking test (abandoned)
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_feature_viewer.py`: Main PyQt5 UI (CLI args updated, weighted integration pending)
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_zone_visualizer.py`: Zone visualizer (CLI args updated, weighted integration pending)
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_advanced_baseline_test.py`: Diagnostic baseline/motion script
- `prototype-commands.md`: Hardware mapping, CLI docs, tuning guide, 1m layout
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_feature_viewer.py`: Needs integration of subcarrier weighting logic
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_zone_visualizer.py`: Needs integration of subcarrier weighting logic
</thinking>

## Goal
- Integrate subcarrier-weighted amplitude detection into the PyQt5 UI tools for robust 3-zone presence tracking, and design a lightweight JSON stream for p5.js wall projection.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Hardware: 1x Heltec sender (`/dev/cu.usbserial-0001`), 3x Arduino Nano receivers (`/dev/cu.usbmodem1101`, `101`, `2101`)
- Layout: Sender ~1m behind wall; receivers ~1.3m apart in straight line
- Visualization target: PyQt5 desktop UI + p5.js wall projection
- ESP-IDF v5.5.4, baud 921600, 166/192 subcarriers usable per mask
- Accept 3-zone spatial resolution; prioritize detection robustness over fine positioning

## Progress
### Done
- Added CLI args (`--top-pct-norm-divisor`, `--motion-norm-divisor`, EMA alphas/weights) to `csi_feature_viewer.py`, `csi_zone_visualizer.py`, `csi_advanced_baseline_test.py` (1m defaults: 120.0 / 40.0)
- Updated `prototype-commands.md` with 1m layout, threshold tuning guide, CLI flag reference, and 6m legacy defaults
- Phase Y-tracking (`csi_phase_position_test.py`) and CIR tracking (`csi_cir_test.py`) tested and proven infeasible: phase σ=1.25-2.12 rad, CIR energy ratio 0.02-0.15, taps unstable
- Created `csi_enhanced_spatial_test.py` implementing CoV-based subcarrier sensitivity weighting + cross-receiver amplitude correlation
- Fixed motion normalization bug in enhanced test (accumulated sum instead of per-frame mean)
- Enhanced test confirmed subcarrier weighting improves per-receiver detection sensitivity but does not unlock finer spatial resolution than 3-zone amplitude approach
### In Progress
- Integrating subcarrier-weighted detection pipeline into `csi_feature_viewer.py` and `csi_zone_visualizer.py`
- Designing lightweight JSON stream output format for p5.js wall projection
### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Abandoned phase cross-correlation and CIR-based Y-tracking (clock drift + wall multipath dominate spatial signature even at 1m)
- Accept 3-zone resolution; use 192-dim CSI for CoV-weighted detection robustness instead of finer positioning
- CLI-based threshold tuning adopted over hardcoded divisors to support flexible 1m vs 6m setups without code changes

## Next Steps
- Finish weighted detection integration in `csi_feature_viewer.py` and `csi_zone_visualizer.py`
- Define and implement p5.js JSON stream schema and emitter
- Update `prototype-commands.md` with enhanced spatial detection docs and p5.js integration commands

## Critical Context
- Phase/CIR failures: phase σ remains uniformly random (1.2-2.1 rad); CIR taps jump unpredictably because wall reflections dominate the impulse response
- Subcarrier CoV weights are nearly uniform after masking (range ~0.007-0.015) → all subcarriers respond similarly to movement
- Calibration motion stats (post-bugfix): mean ~9.2, std ~10.5; motion raw values range 1-140 during idle/movement
- Normalization divisors for 1m: `top_pct=120.0`, `motion=40.0` (legacy 6m: `30.0`/`15.0`)
- Combined presence: `0.6 * top_pct + 0.4 * motion` with EMA smoothing (alpha 0.25/0.30)

## Relevant Files
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_enhanced_spatial_test.py`: CoV-weighted amplitude + cross-receiver correlation diagnostic
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_cir_test.py`: CIR diagnostic script (positioning abandoned)
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_phase_position_test.py`: Phase Y-tracking test (abandoned)
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_feature_viewer.py`: Main PyQt5 UI (CLI args added, weighted integration pending)
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_zone_visualizer.py`: Zone visualizer (CLI args added, weighted integration pending)
- `examples/get-started/tools/csi_advanced_baseline_test.py`: Rolling baseline + motion diagnostic
- `prototype-commands.md`: Hardware mapping, CLI docs, threshold tuning guide, 1m layout

12: 
13: import numpy as np
14: 
15: from PyQt5 import QtCore, QtGui, QtWidgets
16: 
17: 
18: DEFAULT_RECEIVERS = {
19:     "left": "/dev/cu.usbmodem1101",
20:     "center": "/dev/cu.usbmodem101",
21:     "right": "/dev/cu.usbmodem2101",
22: }
23: 
24: ZONE_ORDER = ("left", "center", "right")
25: ZONE_X = {"left": -1.0, "center": 0.0, "right": 1.0}
26: ZONE_COLORS = {
27:     "left": QtGui.QColor(204, 63, 47),
28:     "center": QtGui.QColor(18, 18, 18),
29:     "right": QtGui.QColor(38, 103, 185),
30: }
31: 
32: ROLLING_WINDOW = 150
33: TOP_PCT = 0.20
34: TOP_PCT_NORM_DIVISOR = 120.0
35: MOTION_NORM_DIVISOR = 40.0
36: TOP_PCT_EMA_ALPHA = 0.25
37: MOTION_EMA_ALPHA = 0.30
38: COMBINED_TOP_PCT_WEIGHT = 0.6
39: 
40: 
41: def clamp(value, low=0.0, high=1.0):
42:     return max(low, min(high, value))
43: 
44: 
45: def wrap_pi(value):
46:     while value <= -math.pi:
47:         value += math.tau
48:     while value > math.pi:
49:         value -= math.tau
50:     return value
51: 
52: 
53: def parse_csi_line(line):
54:     start = line.find("CSI_DATA")
55:     if start < 0:
56:         return None
57:     try:
58:         row = next(csv.reader([line[start:].strip()]))
59:         values = ast.literal_eval(row[-1])
60:         amps = []
61:         phases = []
62:         for index in range(0, len(values) - 1, 2):
63:             imag = values[index]
64:             real = values[index + 1]
65:             amps.append(math.hypot(real, imag))
66:             phases.append(math.atan2(imag, real))
67:         if not amps:
68:             return None
69:         return {
70:             "rssi": int(row[3]),
71:             "timestamp": int(row[18]),
72:             "mean_amp": sum(amps) / len(amps),
73:             "amps": amps,
74:             "phase_steps": [
75:                 wrap_pi(phases[i + 1] - phases[i])
76:                 for i in range(len(phases) - 1)
77:             ],
78:         }
79:     except Exception:
80:         return None
81: 
82: 
83: def average_vector(frames):
84:     width = min(len(frame) for frame in frames)
85:     return [
86:         sum(frame[i] for frame in frames) / len(frames)
87:         for i in range(width)
88:     ]
89: 
90: 
91: def vector_distance(a, b):
92:     width = min(len(a), len(b))
93:     if width == 0:
94:         return 0.0
95:     return sum(abs(a[i] - b[i]) for i in range(width)) / width
96: 
97: 
98: def vector_p95(values):
99:     if not values:
100:         return 0.0
101:     ordered = sorted(values)
102:     return ordered[min(len(ordered) - 1, int(0.95 * len(ordered)))]
103: 
104: 
105: def phase_step_distance(a, b):
106:     width = min(len(a), len(b))
107:     if width == 0:
108:         return 0.0
109:     return sum(abs(wrap_pi(a[i] - b[i])) for i in range(width)) / width
110: 
111: 
112: def load_subcarrier_mask(path):
113:     if not path:
114:         return None
115:     payload = json.loads(Path(path).read_text())
116:     indices = payload.get("usable_indices", [])
117:     if not indices:
118:         return None
119:     return {
120:         "path": str(path),
121:         "usable_indices": sorted({int(index) for index in indices}),
122:         "subcarriers": int(payload.get("subcarriers", len(indices))),
123:         "usable_count": int(payload.get("usable_count", len(indices))),
124:         "rejected_count": int(payload.get("rejected_count", 0)),
125:     }
126: 
127: 
128: def masked_values(values, indices):
129:     if not indices:
130:         return values
131:     return [values[index] for index in indices if index < len(values)]
132: 
133: 
134: def median_value(values):
135:     if not values:
136:         return 0.0
137:     ordered = sorted(values)
138:     mid = len(ordered) // 2
139:     if len(ordered) % 2:
140:         return ordered[mid]
141:     return (ordered[mid - 1] + ordered[mid]) / 2.0
142: 
143: 
144: def mean_value(values):
145:     return sum(values) / len(values) if values else 0.0
146: 
147: 
148: def mean_std(values, minimum_std=0.05):
149:     if not values:
150:         return {"mean": 0.0, "std": 1.0}
151:     mean = mean_value(values)
152:     variance = sum((value - mean) ** 2 for value in values) / len(values)
153:     adaptive_floor = max(minimum_std, abs(mean) * 0.12)
154:     return {"mean": mean, "std": max(math.sqrt(variance), adaptive_floor)}
155: 
156: 
157: def baseline_ema_update(baseline, amps, alpha):
158:     """Exponential moving average update of the amplitude baseline vector."""
159:     width = min(len(baseline), len(amps))
160:     for i in range(width):
161:         baseline[i] += alpha * (amps[i] - baseline[i])
162: 
163: 
164: def median_vector(frames):
165:     """Compute per-element median across a list of vectors."""
166:     if not frames:
167:         return []
168:     width = min(len(f) for f in frames)
169:     result = []
170:     for i in range(width):
171:         col = sorted(frames[j][i] for j in range(len(frames)))
172:         mid = len(col) // 2
173:         result.append(col[mid] if len(col) % 2 else (col[mid - 1] + col[mid]) / 2)
174:     return result
175: 
176: 
177: def top_percentile_mean(values, pct):
178:     """Return mean of the top pct fraction of values."""
179:     if not values:
180:         return 0.0
181:     top_k = max(1, int(len(values) * pct))
182:     top_vals = sorted(values)[-top_k:]
183:     return sum(top_vals) / top_k
184: 
185: 
186: def normalized_deviation(value, baseline_stats):
187:     if not baseline_stats:
188:         return max(0.0, value)
189:     return max(0.0, (value - baseline_stats["mean"]) / baseline_stats["std"])
190: 
191: 
192: class FeatureLogger:
193:     def __init__(self, path):
194:         self.path = Path(path) if path else None
195:         self.handle = None
196:         self.writer = None
197:         self.width = None
198: 
199:     def close(self):
200:         if self.handle:
201:             self.handle.close()
202:             self.handle = None
203: 
204:     def write_payload(self, payload):
205:         if not self.path or not payload.get("ready"):
206:             return
207: 
208:         features = payload["features"]
209:         vectors = [
210:             features[label].get("amp_delta", [])
211:             for label in ZONE_ORDER
212:             if features[label].get("amp_delta")
213:         ]
214:         if not vectors:
215:             return
216: 
217:         width = min(len(vector) for vector in vectors)
218:         if self.writer is None:
219:             self.width = width
220:             self.path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
221:             self.handle = self.path.open("w", newline="")
222:             header = [
223:                 "wall_time",
224:                 "receiver",
225:                 "winner",
226:                 "zone_confidence",
227:                 "presence_raw",
228:                 "presence_filtered",
229:                 "presence_normalized",
230:                 "presence_score",
231:                 "motion_raw",
232:                 "motion_filtered",
233:                 "motion_normalized",
234:                 "motion_score",
235:                 "phase_motion_raw",
236:                 "phase_motion_filtered",
237:                 "phase_motion_normalized",
238:                 "phase_motion_score",
239:                 "top_pct_presence",
240:                 "motion_presence",
241:                 "combined_presence",
242:                 "position_raw",
243:                 "position_filtered",
244:                 "target_confidence",
245:                 "delta_p95",
246:                 "delta_max",
247:                 "baseline_drift",
248:                 "baseline_updates",
249:                 "rssi",
250:                 "mean_amp",
251:                 "rows",
252:             ]
253:             header.extend(f"amp_delta_{index:03d}" for index in range(width))
254:             self.writer = csv.writer(self.handle)
255:             self.writer.writerow(header)
256: 
257:         width = min(self.width, width)
258:         for label in ZONE_ORDER:
259:             item = features[label]
260:             row = [
261:                 payload["wall_time"],
262:                 label,
263:                 payload["winner"],
264:                 payload["confidence"].get(label, 0.0),
265:                 item["presence_raw"],
266:                 item["presence_filtered"],
267:                 item["presence_normalized"],
268:                 item["presence_score"],
269:                 item["motion_raw"],
270:                 item["motion_filtered"],
271:                 item["motion_normalized"],
272:                 item["motion_score"],
273:                 item["phase_motion_raw"],
274:                 item["phase_motion_filtered"],
275:                 item["phase_motion_normalized"],

281:                 payload["position"],

283:                 item["delta_p95"],
284:                 item["delta_max"],

286:                 item["baseline_updates"],
287:                 item["rssi"],
288:                 item["mean_amp"],
289:                 item["rows"],
290:             ]
291:             row.extend(item.get("amp_delta", [])[:width])
292:             self.writer.writerow(row)

296: class FeatureWorker(QtCore.QThread):
297:     values = QtCore.pyqtSignal(dict)
298:     status = QtCore.pyqtSignal(str)
299: 
300:     def __init__(
301:         self,
302:         receivers,
303:         baud,
304:         calibration_frames,
305:         emit_interval,
306:         score_alpha,
307:         log_csv,
308:         subcarrier_mask,
309:         median_window,
310:         position_average_window,
311:         baseline_alpha=0.0,
312:         baseline_motion_gate=0.6,
313:         top_pct_norm_divisor=TOP_PCT_NORM_DIVISOR,
314:         motion_norm_divisor=MOTION_NORM_DIVISOR,
315:         top_pct_ema_alpha=TOP_PCT_EMA_ALPHA,
316:         motion_ema_alpha=MOTION_EMA_ALPHA,
317:         combined_top_pct_weight=COMBINED_TOP_PCT_WEIGHT,
318:     ):
319:         super().__init__()
320:         self.receivers = receivers
321:         self.baud = baud
322:         self.total_calibration_frames = max(len(ZONE_ORDER) * 20, int(calibration_frames))
323:         self.calibration_frames = self.frames_per_receiver(self.total_calibration_frames)
324:         self.emit_interval = emit_interval
325:         self.score_alpha = score_alpha
326:         self.logger = FeatureLogger(log_csv)
327:         self.subcarrier_mask = subcarrier_mask
328:         self.median_window = max(1, int(median_window))
329:         self.position_average_window = max(1, int(position_average_window))
330:         self.position_history = deque(maxlen=self.position_average_window)
331:         self.target_confidence_history = deque(maxlen=self.position_average_window)
332:         self.subcarrier_indices = (
333:             subcarrier_mask["usable_indices"]
334:             if subcarrier_mask
335:             else None
336:         )
337:         self.running = True
338:         self.recalibration_frames = None
339:         self.baseline_alpha = clamp(baseline_alpha, 0.0, 0.1)
340:         self.baseline_motion_gate = baseline_motion_gate
341:         self.top_pct_norm_divisor = top_pct_norm_divisor
342:         self.motion_norm_divisor = motion_norm_divisor
343:         self.top_pct_ema_alpha = top_pct_ema_alpha
344:         self.motion_ema_alpha = motion_ema_alpha
345:         self.combined_top_pct_weight = combined_top_pct_weight
346: 
347:     def frames_per_receiver(self, total_frames):
348:         return max(20, math.ceil(int(total_frames) / len(ZONE_ORDER)))
349: 
350:     def stop(self):
351:         self.running = False
352: 
353:     def set_baseline_alpha(self, alpha):
354:         self.baseline_alpha = clamp(alpha, 0.0, 0.05)
355: 
356:     def request_recalibration(self, frames):
357:         self.recalibration_frames = max(len(ZONE_ORDER) * 20, int(frames))
358: 
359:     def reset_receiver_state(self, item):
360:         item["baseline_frames"] = []
361:         item["baseline_phase_frames"] = []
362:         item["baseline"] = None
363:         item["initial_baseline"] = None
364:         item["baseline_stats"] = {}
365:         item["baseline_drift"] = 0.0
366:         item["baseline_updates"] = 0
367:         item["previous_amps"] = None
368:         item["previous_phase_steps"] = None
369:         item["presence_score"] = 0.0
370:         item["motion_score"] = 0.0
371:         item["phase_motion_score"] = 0.0
372:         item["presence_raw"] = 0.0
373:         item["presence_filtered"] = 0.0
374:         item["presence_normalized"] = 0.0
375:         item["motion_raw"] = 0.0
376:         item["motion_filtered"] = 0.0
377:         item["motion_normalized"] = 0.0
378:         item["phase_motion_raw"] = 0.0
379:         item["phase_motion_filtered"] = 0.0
380:         item["phase_motion_normalized"] = 0.0
381:         item["presence_history"] = deque(maxlen=self.median_window)
382:         item["motion_history"] = deque(maxlen=self.median_window)
383:         item["phase_motion_history"] = deque(maxlen=self.median_window)
384:         item["delta_p95"] = 0.0
385:         item["delta_max"] = 0.0
386:         item["amp_delta"] = []
387:         item["amp_delta_masked"] = []
388:         item["rolling_window"] = deque(maxlen=ROLLING_WINDOW)
389:         item["top_pct_presence"] = 0.0
390:         item["motion_presence"] = 0.0
391:         item["combined_presence"] = 0.0
392: 
393:     def run(self):
394:         import serial
395: 
396:         streams = {}
397:         state = {
398:             label: {
399:                 "baseline_frames": [],
400:                 "baseline_phase_frames": [],
401:                 "baseline": None,
402:                 "initial_baseline": None,
403:                 "baseline_stats": {},
404:                 "baseline_drift": 0.0,
405:                 "baseline_updates": 0,
406:                 "previous_amps": None,
407:                 "previous_phase_steps": None,
408:                 "presence_score": 0.0,
409:                 "motion_score": 0.0,
410:                 "phase_motion_score": 0.0,
411:                 "presence_raw": 0.0,
412:                 "presence_filtered": 0.0,
413:                 "presence_normalized": 0.0,
414:                 "motion_raw": 0.0,
415:                 "motion_filtered": 0.0,
416:                 "motion_normalized": 0.0,
417:                 "phase_motion_raw": 0.0,
418:                 "phase_motion_filtered": 0.0,
419:                 "phase_motion_normalized": 0.0,
420:                 "presence_history": deque(maxlen=self.median_window),
421:                 "motion_history": deque(maxlen=self.median_window),
422:                 "phase_motion_history": deque(maxlen=self.median_window),
423:                 "delta_p95": 0.0,
424:                 "delta_max": 0.0,
425:                 "amp_delta": [],
426:                 "amp_delta_masked": [],
427:                 "rolling_window": deque(maxlen=ROLLING_WINDOW),
428:                 "top_pct_presence": 0.0,
429:                 "motion_presence": 0.0,
430:                 "combined_presence": 0.0,
431:                 "rows": 0,
432:                 "rssi": 0,
433:                 "mean_amp": 0.0,
434:             }
435:             for label in ZONE_ORDER
436:         }
437:         last_emit = 0.0
438: 
439:         try:
440:             for label, port in self.receivers.items():
441:                 streams[label] = serial.Serial(port, self.baud, timeout=0.005)
442:                 self.status.emit(f"{label} opened on {port}")
443: 
444:             while self.running:
445:                 if self.recalibration_frames is not None:
446:                     self.calibration_frames = self.recalibration_frames
447:                     self.recalibration_frames = None
448:                     for item in state.values():
449:                         self.reset_receiver_state(item)
450:                     self.position_history.clear()
451:                     self.target_confidence_history.clear()
452:                     self.status.emit(f"recalibrating {self.calibration_frames} frames")
453: 
454:                 for label, stream in streams.items():
455:                     parsed = parse_csi_line(stream.readline().decode("utf-8", "replace"))
456:                     if not parsed:
457:                         continue
458: 
459:                     item = state[label]
460:                     item["rows"] += 1
461:                     item["rssi"] = parsed["rssi"]
462:                     item["mean_amp"] = parsed["mean_amp"]
463:                     amps = parsed["amps"]
464:                     phase_steps = parsed["phase_steps"]
465: 
466:                     if item["baseline"] is None:
467:                         item["baseline_frames"].append(amps)
468:                         if len(item["baseline_frames"]) >= self.calibration_frames:
469:                             item["baseline"] = average_vector(item["baseline_frames"])
470:                             item["initial_baseline"] = list(item["baseline"])
471:                             item["baseline_frames"] = []
472:                             self.status.emit(f"{label} calibrated")
473:                         continue
474: 
475:                     width = min(len(amps), len(item["baseline"]))
476:                     amp_delta = [
477:                         abs(amps[index] - item["baseline"][index])
478:                         for index in range(width)
479:                     ]
480:                     item["amp_delta"] = amp_delta
481:                     amp_delta_masked = masked_values(amp_delta, self.subcarrier_indices)
482:                     item["amp_delta_masked"] = amp_delta_masked
483:                     presence_raw = (
484:                         sum(amp_delta_masked) / len(amp_delta_masked)
485:                         if amp_delta_masked
486:                         else 0.0
487:                     )
488:                     motion_raw = (
489:                         vector_distance(amps, item["previous_amps"])
490:                         if item["previous_amps"]
491:                         else 0.0
492:                     )
493:                     phase_motion_raw = (
494:                         phase_step_distance(phase_steps, item["previous_phase_steps"])
495:                         if item["previous_phase_steps"]
496:                         else 0.0
497:                     )
498:                     item["presence_raw"] = presence_raw
499:                     item["motion_raw"] = motion_raw
500:                     item["phase_motion_raw"] = phase_motion_raw
501:                     item["presence_history"].append(presence_raw)
502:                     item["motion_history"].append(motion_raw)
503:                     item["phase_motion_history"].append(phase_motion_raw)
504:                     item["presence_filtered"] = median_value(item["presence_history"])
505:                     item["motion_filtered"] = median_value(item["motion_history"])
506:                     item["phase_motion_filtered"] = median_value(item["phase_motion_history"])
507:                     item["delta_p95"] = vector_p95(amp_delta_masked)
508:                     item["delta_max"] = max(amp_delta_masked, default=0.0)
509:                     item["previous_amps"] = amps
510:                     item["previous_phase_steps"] = phase_steps
511: 
512:                     alpha = self.score_alpha
513:                     item["presence_score"] = (
514:                         (1.0 - alpha) * item["presence_score"]
515:                         + alpha * item["presence_filtered"]
516:                     )
517:                     item["motion_score"] = (
518:                         (1.0 - alpha) * item["motion_score"]
519:                         + alpha * item["motion_filtered"]
520:                     )
521:                     item["phase_motion_score"] = (
522:                         (1.0 - alpha) * item["phase_motion_score"]
523:                         + alpha * item["phase_motion_filtered"]
524:                     )
525: 
526:                     item["rolling_window"].append(amps)
527:                     if len(item["rolling_window"]) >= 30:
528:                         rolling_bl = median_vector(list(item["rolling_window"]))
529:                         rw = min(len(amps), len(rolling_bl))
530:                         rolling_delta = [abs(amps[i] - rolling_bl[i]) for i in range(rw)]
531:                         top_pct_val = top_percentile_mean(rolling_delta, TOP_PCT)
532:                         top_pct_norm = min(top_pct_val / self.top_pct_norm_divisor, 1.0)
533:                         motion_norm = min(motion_raw / self.motion_norm_divisor, 1.0)
534:                         item["top_pct_presence"] = (
535:                             (1.0 - self.top_pct_ema_alpha) * item["top_pct_presence"]
536:                             + self.top_pct_ema_alpha * top_pct_norm
537:                         )
538:                         item["motion_presence"] = (
539:                             (1.0 - self.motion_ema_alpha) * item["motion_presence"]
540:                             + self.motion_ema_alpha * motion_norm
541:                         )
542:                         item["combined_presence"] = (
543:                             self.combined_top_pct_weight * item["top_pct_presence"]
544:                             + (1.0 - self.combined_top_pct_weight) * item["motion_presence"]
545:                         )
546: 
547:                     if (
548:                         self.baseline_alpha > 0.0
549:                         and item["initial_baseline"] is not None
550:                         and motion_raw < self.baseline_motion_gate
551:                     ):
552:                         baseline_ema_update(item["baseline"], amps, self.baseline_alpha)
553:                         item["baseline_updates"] += 1
554:                         item["baseline_drift"] = vector_distance(
555:                             item["baseline"], item["initial_baseline"]
556:                         )
557: 
558:                 now = time.monotonic()
559:                 if now - last_emit < self.emit_interval:
560:                     continue
561:                 last_emit = now
562:                 payload = self.make_payload(state)
563:                 self.logger.write_payload(payload)
564:                 self.values.emit(payload)
565:         except Exception as exc:
566:             self.status.emit(f"error: {exc}")
567:         finally:
568:             self.logger.close()
569:             for stream in streams.values():
570:                 try:
571:                     stream.close()
572:                 except Exception:
573:                     pass
574: 
575:     def make_payload(self, state):
576:         ready = {
577:             label: state[label]["baseline"] is not None
578:             for label in ZONE_ORDER
579:         }
580:         progress = {
581:             label: 1.0
582:             if ready[label]
583:             else clamp(len(state[label]["baseline_frames"]) / self.calibration_frames)
584:             for label in ZONE_ORDER
585:         }
586:         scores = {
587:             label: max(0.0, state[label].get("combined_presence", state[label]["presence_score"]))
588:             for label in ZONE_ORDER
589:         }
590:         total = sum(scores.values())
591:         confidence = (
592:             {label: scores[label] / total for label in ZONE_ORDER}
593:             if total > 0
594:             else {label: 1.0 / len(ZONE_ORDER) for label in ZONE_ORDER}
595:         )
596:         winner = max(confidence, key=confidence.get)
597:         position_raw = sum(ZONE_X[label] * confidence[label] for label in ZONE_ORDER)
598:         target_confidence_raw = max(confidence.values(), default=0.0)
599:         self.position_history.append(position_raw)
600:         self.target_confidence_history.append(target_confidence_raw)
601:         position = mean_value(self.position_history)
602:         target_confidence = mean_value(self.target_confidence_history)
603:         activity = max(scores.values(), default=0.0)
604: 
605:         return {
606:             "ready": all(ready.values()),
607:             "wall_time": time.time(),
608:             "progress": progress,
609:             "scores": scores,
610:             "confidence": confidence,
611:             "winner": winner,
612:             "position_raw": position_raw,
613:             "position": position,
614:             "target_confidence_raw": target_confidence_raw,
615:             "target_confidence": target_confidence,
616:             "activity": activity,
617:             "features": {
618:                 label: {
619:                     key: state[label][key]
620:                     for key in (
621:                         "presence_raw",
622:                         "presence_filtered",
623:                         "presence_normalized",
624:                         "presence_score",
625:                         "motion_raw",
626:                         "motion_filtered",
627:                         "motion_normalized",
628:                         "motion_score",
629:                         "phase_motion_raw",
630:                         "phase_motion_filtered",
631:                         "phase_motion_normalized",
632:                         "phase_motion_score",
633:                         "top_pct_presence",
634:                         "motion_presence",
635:                         "combined_presence",
636:                         "delta_p95",
637:                         "delta_max",
638:                         "amp_delta",
639:                         "amp_delta_masked",
640:                         "rows",
641:                         "rssi",
642:                         "mean_amp",
643:                         "baseline_drift",
644:                         "baseline_updates",
645:                     )
646:                 }
647:                 for label in ZONE_ORDER
648:             },
649:             "subcarrier_mask": self.subcarrier_mask,
650:             "filters": {
651:                 "median_window": self.median_window,
652:                 "position_average_window": self.position_average_window,
653:                 "baseline_alpha": self.baseline_alpha,
654:                 "baseline_motion_gate": self.baseline_motion_gate,
655:                 "thresholds": {
656:                     "top_pct_norm_divisor": self.top_pct_norm_divisor,
657:                     "motion_norm_divisor": self.motion_norm_divisor,
658:                     "top_pct_ema_alpha": self.top_pct_ema_alpha,
659:                     "motion_ema_alpha": self.motion_ema_alpha,
660:                     "combined_top_pct_weight": self.combined_top_pct_weight,
661:                 },
662:             },
663:         }
664: 
665: 
666: class FeatureView(QtWidgets.QWidget):
667:     recalibrate_requested = QtCore.pyqtSignal(int)
668:     baseline_alpha_changed = QtCore.pyqtSignal(float)
669: 
670:     def __init__(self, waterfall_rows, default_scale, default_calibration_frames):
671:         super().__init__()
672:         self.setWindowTitle("CSI Feature Viewer")
673:         self.resize(1220, 780)
674:         self.setMinimumSize(900, 760)
675:         self.waterfall_rows = waterfall_rows
676:         self.payload = {
677:             "ready": False,
678:             "progress": {label: 0.0 for label in ZONE_ORDER},
679:             "confidence": {label: 1.0 / len(ZONE_ORDER) for label in ZONE_ORDER},
680:             "winner": "center",
681:             "position_raw": 0.0,
682:             "position": 0.0,
683:             "target_confidence_raw": 0.0,
684:             "target_confidence": 0.0,
685:             "activity": 0.0,
686:             "features": {},
687:             "subcarrier_mask": None,
688:             "filters": {},
689:         }
690:         self.motion_history = {label: deque(maxlen=260) for label in ZONE_ORDER}
691:         self.presence_history = {label: deque(maxlen=260) for label in ZONE_ORDER}
692:         self.waterfall = deque(maxlen=waterfall_rows)
693:         self.selected_receiver = "center"
694:         self.waterfall_scale = default_scale
695:         self.calibration_frames = default_calibration_frames
696:         self.y_confidence_threshold = 0.55
697:         self.baseline_alpha = 0.0
698:         self.status = "starting"
699: 
700:         self.receiver_select = QtWidgets.QComboBox(self)
701:         self.receiver_select.addItems(ZONE_ORDER)
702:         self.receiver_select.setCurrentText(self.selected_receiver)
703:         self.receiver_select.currentTextChanged.connect(self.set_selected_receiver)
704: 
705:         self.scale_slider = QtWidgets.QSlider(QtCore.Qt.Horizontal, self)
706:         self.scale_slider.setRange(2, 80)
707:         self.scale_slider.setValue(int(default_scale * 10))
708:         self.scale_slider.setFixedWidth(220)
709:         self.scale_slider.valueChanged.connect(self.set_waterfall_scale)
710: 
711:         self.calibration_slider = QtWidgets.QSlider(QtCore.Qt.Horizontal, self)
712:         self.calibration_slider.setRange(80, 5000)
713:         self.calibration_slider.setSingleStep(20)
714:         self.calibration_slider.setPageStep(250)
715:         self.calibration_slider.setValue(self.calibration_frames)
716:         self.calibration_slider.setFixedWidth(220)
717:         self.calibration_slider.valueChanged.connect(self.set_calibration_frames)
718: 
719:         self.recalibrate_button = QtWidgets.QPushButton("recalibrate baseline", self)
720:         self.recalibrate_button.setFixedSize(160, 28)
721:         self.recalibrate_button.clicked.connect(self.recalibrate)
722: 
723:         self.baseline_alpha_slider = QtWidgets.QSlider(QtCore.Qt.Horizontal, self)
724:         self.baseline_alpha_slider.setRange(0, 50)
725:         self.baseline_alpha_slider.setSingleStep(1)
726:         self.baseline_alpha_slider.setPageStep(5)
727:         self.baseline_alpha_slider.setValue(0)
728:         self.baseline_alpha_slider.setFixedWidth(220)
729:         self.baseline_alpha_slider.valueChanged.connect(self.set_baseline_alpha)
730: 
731:         self.y_threshold_slider = QtWidgets.QSlider(QtCore.Qt.Horizontal, self)
732:         self.y_threshold_slider.setRange(34, 95)
733:         self.y_threshold_slider.setSingleStep(1)
734:         self.y_threshold_slider.setPageStep(5)
735:         self.y_threshold_slider.setValue(int(self.y_confidence_threshold * 100))
736:         self.y_threshold_slider.setFixedWidth(220)
737:         self.y_threshold_slider.valueChanged.connect(self.set_y_confidence_threshold)
738: 
739:         self.setStyleSheet(
740:             """
741:             QWidget, QComboBox, QPushButton, QSlider {
742:                 color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
743:             }
744:             QComboBox, QPushButton {
745:                 background: rgb(248, 248, 246);
746:                 border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 90);
747:                 border-radius: 3px;
748:                 padding: 3px 8px;
749:             }
750:             QComboBox QAbstractItemView {
751:                 color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
752:                 background: rgb(255, 255, 255);
753:                 selection-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
754:                 selection-background-color: rgb(224, 224, 220);
755:             }
756:             QSlider::groove:horizontal {
757:                 height: 2px;
758:                 background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 70);
759:             }
760:             QSlider::sub-page:horizontal {
761:                 background: rgb(0, 0, 0);
762:             }
763:             QSlider::handle:horizontal {
764:                 width: 12px;
765:                 height: 12px;
766:                 margin: -5px 0;
767:                 border-radius: 6px;
768:                 background: rgb(0, 0, 0);
769:             }
770:             """
771:         )
772: 
773:         self.timer = QtCore.QTimer(self)
774:         self.timer.timeout.connect(self.update)
775:         self.timer.start(33)
776: 
777:     def set_status(self, status):
778:         self.status = status
779:         self.update()
780: 
781:     def set_selected_receiver(self, label):
782:         self.selected_receiver = label
783:         self.waterfall.clear()
784:         self.update()
785: 
786:     def set_waterfall_scale(self, value):
787:         self.waterfall_scale = max(0.2, value / 10.0)
788:         self.update()
789: 
790:     def set_calibration_frames(self, value):
791:         self.calibration_frames = int(value)
792:         self.update()
793: 
794:     def set_y_confidence_threshold(self, value):
795:         self.y_confidence_threshold = value / 100.0
796:         self.update()
797: 
798:     def set_baseline_alpha(self, value):
799:         self.baseline_alpha = value / 1000.0
800:         self.baseline_alpha_changed.emit(self.baseline_alpha)
801:         self.update()
802: 
803:     def recalibrate(self):
804:         self.motion_history = {label: deque(maxlen=260) for label in ZONE_ORDER}
805:         self.presence_history = {label: deque(maxlen=260) for label in ZONE_ORDER}
806:         self.waterfall.clear()
807:         self.status = f"recalibrating {self.calibration_frames} frames"
808:         self.recalibrate_requested.emit(self.calibration_frames)
809:         self.update()
810: 
811:     def resizeEvent(self, event):
812:         super().resizeEvent(event)
813:         margin = 28
814:         y = self.height() - 42
815:         self.receiver_select.move(margin, y)
816:         self.recalibrate_button.move(margin + 170, y - 2)
817:         self.calibration_slider.move(margin + 350, y + 2)
818:         self.baseline_alpha_slider.move(margin + 590, y + 2)
819:         y_panel_top = self.height() - 78 - 96
820:         self.y_threshold_slider.move(self.width() - self.y_threshold_slider.width() - margin - 16, y_panel_top + 18)
821:         self.scale_slider.move(self.width() - self.scale_slider.width() - margin, y + 2)
822: 
823:     def set_values(self, payload):
824:         self.payload = payload
825:         if payload.get("ready"):
826:             features = payload.get("features", {})
827:             for label in ZONE_ORDER:
828:                 item = features.get(label, {})
829:                 self.motion_history[label].append(item.get("motion_score", 0.0))
830:                 self.presence_history[label].append(item.get("presence_score", 0.0))
831:             selected = features.get(self.selected_receiver, {})
832:             amp_delta = selected.get("amp_delta_masked") or selected.get("amp_delta", [])
833:             if amp_delta:
834:                 self.waterfall.append(list(amp_delta))
835:         self.update()
836: 
837:     def paintEvent(self, event):
838:         painter = QtGui.QPainter(self)
839:         painter.setRenderHint(QtGui.QPainter.Antialiasing)
840:         rect = self.rect()
841:         painter.fillRect(rect, QtGui.QColor(248, 248, 246))
842: 
843:         margin = 28
844:         header_h = 76
845:         top = margin
846:         self.draw_header(painter, QtCore.QRectF(margin, top, rect.width() - 2 * margin, header_h))
847: 
848:         row_top = top + header_h + 18
849:         row_h = 150
850:         self.draw_zone_panel(painter, QtCore.QRectF(margin, row_top, rect.width() - 2 * margin, row_h))
851: 
852:         chart_top = row_top + row_h + 20
853:         chart_h = 190
854:         self.draw_curves(painter, QtCore.QRectF(margin, chart_top, rect.width() - 2 * margin, chart_h))
855: 
856:         y_panel_h = 96
857:         controls_h = 78
858:         lower_top = chart_top + chart_h + 20
859:         lower_h = max(64, rect.height() - lower_top - y_panel_h - controls_h - 18)
860:         left_w = int((rect.width() - 2 * margin) * 0.68)
861:         self.draw_waterfall(painter, QtCore.QRectF(margin, lower_top, left_w, lower_h))
862:         self.draw_feature_table(
863:             painter,
864:             QtCore.QRectF(margin + left_w + 24, lower_top, rect.width() - 2 * margin - left_w - 24, lower_h),
865:         )
866: 
867:         y_panel_top = lower_top + lower_h + 18
868:         self.draw_y_position_panel(
869:             painter,
870:             QtCore.QRectF(margin, y_panel_top, rect.width() - 2 * margin, y_panel_h),
871:         )
872: 
873:         self.draw_controls_labels(painter)
874:         if not self.payload.get("ready"):
875:             self.draw_calibration(painter, rect)
876: 
877:     def draw_header(self, painter, rect):
878:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20))
879:         title = QtGui.QFont("Helvetica Neue", 24)
880:         title.setWeight(QtGui.QFont.Medium)
881:         painter.setFont(title)

924:     def draw_zone_panel(self, painter, rect):
925:         self.draw_panel_outline(painter, rect)
926:         confidence = self.payload.get("confidence", {})
927:         zone_centers = {
928:             "left": rect.left() + rect.width() * 0.18,
929:             "center": rect.left() + rect.width() * 0.5,
930:             "right": rect.left() + rect.width() * 0.82,
931:         }
932:         baseline_y = rect.bottom() - 42
933:         max_bar_h = rect.height() - 68
934: 
935:         for label in ZONE_ORDER:
936:             value = confidence.get(label, 0.0)
937:             x = zone_centers[label]
938:             color = ZONE_COLORS[label]

940:             painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(color.red(), color.green(), color.blue(), 46))
941:             painter.drawRoundedRect(QtCore.QRectF(x - 34, baseline_y - max_bar_h, 68, max_bar_h), 3, 3)
942:             painter.setBrush(color)
943:             painter.drawRoundedRect(QtCore.QRectF(x - 34, baseline_y - max_bar_h * value, 68, max_bar_h * value), 3, 3)
944:             painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20))
945:             painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Menlo", 10))
946:             painter.drawText(QtCore.QRectF(x - 58, baseline_y + 12, 116, 18), QtCore.Qt.AlignCenter, f"{label} {value:.2f}")
947: 
948:         line_y = rect.top() + 32
949:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20, 70), 1))
950:         painter.drawLine(QtCore.QPointF(rect.left() + 60, line_y), QtCore.QPointF(rect.right() - 60, line_y))
951:         pos = clamp((self.payload.get("position", 0.0) + 1.0) / 2.0)
952:         marker_x = rect.left() + 60 + (rect.width() - 120) * pos
953:         painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0))
954:         painter.setPen(QtCore.Qt.NoPen)
955:         painter.drawEllipse(QtCore.QPointF(marker_x, line_y), 7, 7)

957:     def draw_curves(self, painter, rect):
958:         self.draw_panel_outline(painter, rect)
959:         painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Helvetica Neue", 12))
960:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20))
961:         painter.drawText(rect.adjusted(14, 10, -14, 0), QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop, "motion and presence over time")
962: 
963:         plot = rect.adjusted(18, 42, -18, -20)
964:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QPen(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 35), 1))
965:         for index in range(4):
966:             y = plot.top() + plot.height() * index / 3
967:             painter.drawLine(QtCore.QPointF(plot.left(), y), QtCore.QPointF(plot.right(), y))
968: 
969:         max_value = max(
970:             [0.4]
971:             + [value for label in ZONE_ORDER for value in self.motion_history[label]]
972:             + [value for label in ZONE_ORDER for value in self.presence_history[label]]
973:         )
974:         for label in ZONE_ORDER:
975:             self.draw_history_line(painter, plot, self.presence_history[label], max_value, ZONE_COLORS[label], 2.4)
976:             pale = QtGui.QColor(ZONE_COLORS[label])
977:             pale.setAlpha(95)
978:             self.draw_history_line(painter, plot, self.motion_history[label], max_value, pale, 1.3)

980:     def draw_history_line(self, painter, rect, values, max_value, color, width):
981:         if len(values) < 2:
982:             return
983:         points = []
984:         for index, value in enumerate(values):
985:             x = rect.left() + rect.width() * index / (values.maxlen - 1)
986:             y = rect.bottom() - rect.height() * clamp(value / max_value)
987:             points.append(QtCore.QPointF(x, y))
988:         path = QtGui.QPainterPath(points[0])
989:         for point in points[1:]:
990:             path.lineTo(point)
991:         pen = QtGui.QPen(color, width)
992:         pen.setCapStyle(QtCore.Qt.RoundCap)
993:         painter.setPen(pen)
994:         painter.drawPath(path)
995: 
996:     def draw_waterfall(self, painter, rect):
997:         self.draw_panel_outline(painter, rect)
998:         painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Helvetica Neue", 12))
999:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20))
1000:         painter.drawText(
1001:             rect.adjusted(14, 10, -14, 0),
1002:             QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop,
1003:             f"{self.selected_receiver} usable subcarrier amplitude delta waterfall",
1004:         )
1005:         image_rect = rect.adjusted(16, 42, -16, -18)
1006:         rows = list(self.waterfall)
1007:         if not rows:
1008:             painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(95, 95, 95))
1009:             painter.drawText(image_rect, QtCore.Qt.AlignCenter, "waiting for calibrated CSI frames")
1010:             return
1011:         width = min(len(row) for row in rows)
1012:         image = QtGui.QImage(width, self.waterfall_rows, QtGui.QImage.Format_RGB32)
1013:         image.fill(QtGui.QColor(245, 245, 243))
1014:         start_y = self.waterfall_rows - len(rows)
1015:         for row_index, row in enumerate(rows):
1016:             y = start_y + row_index
1017:             for x in range(width):
1018:                 level = clamp(row[x] / self.waterfall_scale)
1019:                 shade = int(250 - 230 * level)
1020:                 image.setPixelColor(x, y, QtGui.QColor(shade, shade, shade))
1021:         painter.drawImage(image_rect, image)

1052:     def draw_y_position_panel(self, painter, rect):
1053:         self.draw_panel_outline(painter, rect)
1054:         painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Helvetica Neue", 12))
1055:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(20, 20, 20))
1056:         painter.drawText(rect.adjusted(14, 10, -14, 0), QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop, "estimated y position")
1057: 
1058:         confidence = self.payload.get("confidence", {})
1059:         max_confidence = self.payload.get(
1060:             "target_confidence",
1061:             max(confidence.values(), default=0.0),
1062:         )
1063:         max_confidence_raw = self.payload.get("target_confidence_raw", max_confidence)
1064:         position = clamp((self.payload.get("position", 0.0) + 1.0) / 2.0)
1065:         active = self.payload.get("ready") and max_confidence >= self.y_confidence_threshold
1066: 
1067:         track = QtCore.QRectF(rect.left() + 18, rect.top() + 52, rect.width() - 36, 18)
1068:         painter.setPen(QtCore.Qt.NoPen)
1069:         painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 18))
1070:         painter.drawRoundedRect(track, 9, 9)
1071: 
1072:         zone_font = QtGui.QFont("Menlo", 9)
1073:         painter.setFont(zone_font)
1074:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(80, 80, 80))
1075:         painter.drawText(QtCore.QRectF(track.left(), track.bottom() + 6, 100, 14), QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft, "left")
1076:         painter.drawText(QtCore.QRectF(track.center().x() - 50, track.bottom() + 6, 100, 14), QtCore.Qt.AlignCenter, "center")
1077:         painter.drawText(QtCore.QRectF(track.right() - 100, track.bottom() + 6, 100, 14), QtCore.Qt.AlignRight, "right")
1078: 
1079:         if not active:
1080:             painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Menlo", 10))
1081:             painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(85, 85, 85))
1082:             status = (
1083:                 f"hidden below threshold {self.y_confidence_threshold:.2f}"
1084:                 if self.payload.get("ready")
1085:                 else "waiting for calibrated CSI frames"
1086:             )
1087:             painter.drawText(rect.adjusted(14, 30, -14, 0), QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop, status)
1088:             return
1089: 
1090:         weighted_variance = sum(
1091:             confidence.get(label, 0.0)
1092:             * (ZONE_X[label] - self.payload.get("position", 0.0)) ** 2
1093:             for label in ZONE_ORDER
1094:         )
1095:         uncertainty = clamp(math.sqrt(max(0.0, weighted_variance)))
1096:         half_width = track.width() * clamp(0.07 + 0.26 * uncertainty + 0.14 * (1.0 - max_confidence), 0.06, 0.42)
1097:         center_x = track.left() + track.width() * position
1098:         left = max(track.left(), center_x - half_width)
1099:         right = min(track.right(), center_x + half_width)
1100: 
1101:         gradient = QtGui.QLinearGradient(left, 0, right, 0)
1102:         peak_alpha = int(92 + 125 * max_confidence)
1103:         gradient.setColorAt(0.0, QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 0))
1104:         gradient.setColorAt(0.22, QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, int(peak_alpha * 0.55)))
1105:         gradient.setColorAt(0.5, QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, peak_alpha))
1106:         gradient.setColorAt(0.78, QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, int(peak_alpha * 0.55)))
1107:         gradient.setColorAt(1.0, QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 0))
1108:         painter.setPen(QtCore.Qt.NoPen)
1109:         painter.setBrush(gradient)
1110:         painter.drawRoundedRect(QtCore.QRectF(left, track.top(), right - left, track.height()), 9, 9)
1111: 
1112:         painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0))
1113:         painter.drawRoundedRect(QtCore.QRectF(center_x - 1.5, track.top() - 5, 3, track.height() + 10), 1.5, 1.5)
1114:         painter.setFont(QtGui.QFont("Menlo", 10))
1115:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QColor(35, 35, 35))
1116:         painter.drawText(

1118:             QtCore.Qt.AlignLeft | QtCore.Qt.AlignTop,

1146:     def draw_calibration(self, painter, rect):
1147:         progress = self.payload.get("progress", {})
1148:         value = sum(progress.get(label, 0.0) for label in ZONE_ORDER) / len(ZONE_ORDER)
1149:         bar = QtCore.QRectF(rect.width() * 0.24, rect.height() * 0.93, rect.width() * 0.52, 3)
1150:         painter.setPen(QtCore.Qt.NoPen)
1151:         painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 26))
1152:         painter.drawRect(bar)
1153:         painter.setBrush(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 150))
1154:         painter.drawRect(QtCore.QRectF(bar.left(), bar.top(), bar.width() * value, bar.height()))
1155:

1157:         painter.setPen(QtGui.QPen(QtGui.QColor(0, 0, 0, 36), 1))
1158:         painter.setBrush(QtCore.Qt.NoBrush)
1159:         painter.drawRoundedRect(rect, 4, 4)
